mapper.insert: INSERT INTO PRODUCT_IMAGE ( IMAGE_NO, PRODUCT_NO, ORIGIN_NAME, CHANGE_NAME, FILE_PATH, IMAGE_ORDER, THUMBNAIL_YN, CREATE_DT ) VALUES ( SEQ_PRODUCT_IMAGE.NEXTVAL, #{productNo}, #{originName}, #{changeName}, #{filePath}, #{imageOrder}, #{thumbnailYn}, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT IMAGE_NO, PRODUCT_NO, ORIGIN_NAME, CHANGE_NAME, FILE_PATH, IMAGE_ORDER, THUMBNAIL_YN, TO_CHAR(CREATE_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS CREATE_DT FROM PRODUCT_IMAGE WHERE PRODUCT_NO = #{productNo} ORDER BY IMAGE_ORDER, IMAGE_NO
